mechanisms.public_exercise: Compare two synthetic evidence/prediction arrays and report missed, extra, overlap, matching, and divergent rows.
mechanisms.negative_case: Malformed or mismatched keys are kept out of matched sets and recorded as a bounded parser/diff finding.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Set-diff primitive over public fixture arrays only; not oracle truth or prediction correctness.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Apply set, merge, append, and null-delete slash-selector operations to a synthetic JSON dossier.
mechanisms.negative_case: Traversal through a scalar raises the source VM refusal.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Deterministic JSON patch interpreter only; not semantic edit correctness or repo mutation authority.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Normalize lane aliases and reproduce deterministic ledger ids across repeated calls.
mechanisms.negative_case: Missing required lane identity raises source contract refusal; unknown lanes are explicitly X-prefixed.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Identity/hash normalization primitive only; not proof of record truth or provenance by itself.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Run the shadow parser over synthetic miner, spine, and prediction artifacts with full pass coverage.
mechanisms.negative_case: Malformed tuple/envelope lines produce parse coverage findings without executing private lab nodes.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Grammar/parser coverage engine over synthetic public envelopes only; not Lab truth or execution authority.
